question: Find everything Stellar coverage has on Soroswap — news, talks, research.

golden.answer:
Run a dated Soroswap content search and return the actual matching items by content type, with each item's title, original date, source URL, and a short relevance note. Treat the result as **source-relative and non-exhaustive**: live 2026-07-10 retrieval mixed valid Soroswap coverage with adjacent or false-positive rows, so validate every item rather than replacing the list with a project biography.

If context is useful, describe Soroswap only with separately sourced facts: PaltaLabs' open-source Soroban AMM plus Aggregator/API/SDK/frontend. Attribute 'first' or 'best' claims to Soroswap; distinguish the on-chain aggregator's Soroban-AMM adapters from API/service routing that can include classic SDEX liquidity; and do not insert funding totals unless the returned content concerns SCF.
keyFacts: Returns dated, sourced Soroswap content rows rather than a static identity essay.
Labels the result non-exhaustive and validates false-positive-prone semantic matches.
avoid: Do NOT fabricate or silently promote adjacent content as Soroswap coverage.
Do NOT hard-code identity, funding, routing, or marketing claims that were not returned by the cited content item.
golden.notes:
All-content-for-one-project → lumenloop_find_content_about_project. Grounded on Scout: Soroswap = first DEX + DEX aggregator on Soroban, live mainnet; open-source AMM + an aggregator routing across Soroban AMMs (Soroswap, Phoenix, Aquarius) and the Stellar classic DEX (SDEX) via a swap Route API. SCF-awarded ~$346,750; repos under github.com/soroswap (core/aggregator/frontend).
Also good if the answer: Frames Soroswap as the aggregator/AMM with REST API and Earn when surfacing coverage.
Golden cites: Each surfaced item carries its source.
GT-18 CORRECTION 2026-07-10 supersedes the inherited static-profile guidance. Grade the returned content set, provenance, dates, and false-positive discipline; do not require the inherited first/best, funding, or routing composite.

corroboration.claim: Lumenloop returns mixed Soroswap articles, audiovisual items, events, and research, including false positives; it is not an exhaustive identity record.

evidence.ref: C: live Lumenloop Soroswap content retrieval on 2026-07-10
